name: MentorInputBar mic button emits typed value as transcript (no STT)
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L6-14] mic emits the typed value rather than doing speech recognition (no useSpeechRecognition, unlike NoteInput). Fix: wire STT or relabel; verify parent isn't compensating.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: MentorInputBar mic onPress calls onTranscript(value.trim()) directly and never invokes a speech-recognition hook, so the typed input is emitted as a transcript. Variants: empty typed value, non-empty typed value, and parent/container behavior must not already compensate. Regression test: extend apps/mobile/src/components/mentor/MentorInputBar.test.tsx to prove the mic does not submit the typed text as speech and either wires real STT or is relabeled/disabled so no fake transcript is emitted.
